text: Iran has moved about 9 million barrels of crude from floating storage in the Gulf of Oman since the U.S. naval blockade began on April 13. Source
text_zh: 自4月13日美国海军封锁开始以来，伊朗已从阿曼湾的浮动储油设施中运走了约900万桶原油。来源

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @Etienne_Marcuz : FINALLY ! A French Rafale seen taking off from Istres air base with a rocket pod under its wing, most probably in order to test a low cost solution for drone hunting mission. 📸 via @Bruno_Aviation https://twitter.com/Etienne_Marcuz/status/2044760629114802425/photo/1 Un Rafale équipé de roquettes guidées laser aperçu à Istres. Les essais ont donc enfin démarré. Ici une nacelle Thalès JF12, donc 24 roquettes 68mm au total. Une corde de plus à l'arc du Rafale, la chasse au Shahed est OUVERTE ! https://twitter.com/Bruno_Aviation/status/2044743272363376680/photo/1 - bruno aviation tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转推 @Etienne_Marcuz : 终于！一架法国阵风战斗机被拍到从伊斯特尔空军基地起飞，机翼下挂载着火箭弹吊舱，很可能是为了测试一种用于无人机狩猎任务的低成本解决方案。📸 via @Bruno_Aviation https://twitter.com/Etienne_Marcuz/status/2044760629114802425/photo/1 一架配备激光制导火箭弹的阵风战斗机在伊斯特尔被发现。测试终于开始了。这里是一个泰雷兹JF12吊舱，总共24枚68毫米火箭弹。阵风战斗机的又一项新技能，猎杀“见证者”无人机的行动开始了！ https://twitter.com/Bruno_Aviation/status/2044743272363376680/photo/1 - bruno aviation 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @TankerTrackers : BREAKING; VISUAL CONFIRMATION: IRAN HAS SHIPPED OUT NINE MILLION BARRELS OF CRUDE OIL FROM FLOATING STORAGE IN THE GULF OF OMAN SINCE THE US BLOCKADE WENT INTO EFFECT ON 2026-04-13 AT 14:00 UTC ANOTHER TWO MILLION BARRELS DEPARTED ON 2026-04-12 #OOTT #IranWar #Tankers tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转推 @TankerTrackers : 突发；视觉确认：自美国封锁于2026年4月13日14:00 UTC生效以来，伊朗已从阿曼湾的浮动储油设施中运出了900万桶原油。另有200万桶于2026年4月12日离港 #OOTT #IranWar #Tankers 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @RALee85 : "Vadym Skibitskyi, the deputy head of Ukraine’s defence intelligence directorate, known by its acronym GUR, told the FT in an interview in Kyiv on Friday that Russian forces were stepping up ballistic missile strikes on Ukrainian cities. Moscow is producing about 60 Iskander missiles a month and has expanded its launcher capacity, while Ukraine lacks sufficient advanced air-defence systems such as the US-made Patriot system to cover the entire country, Skibitskyi said. He warned that critical infrastructure, especially energy facilities badly damaged by Russia’s winter air-strike campaign that brought the country close to catastrophe, remains highly vulnerable as a result while Moscow refines its strike tactics... Russia is readying a fresh ground assault in south-eastern Ukraine, dipping into its strategic reserve to add 20,000 fresh troops to its force inside the country, he said. With some 680,000 soldiers now on the ground, Russia is aiming to capture the entire Donbas region by September, he said, citing a GUR assessment shared with the FT." @ChristopherJM https://www.ft.com/content/d47abaa2-8cfc-48eb-a996-909580b8c816 tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转推 @RALee85 : “乌克兰国防情报局（GUR）副局长瓦季姆·斯基比茨基周五在基辅接受《金融时报》采访时表示，俄罗斯军队正在加强对乌克兰城市的弹道导弹袭击。斯基比茨基说，莫斯科每月生产约60枚伊斯坎德尔导弹，并扩大了发射装置产能，而乌克兰缺乏足够的先进防空系统（如美制爱国者系统）来覆盖全国。他警告说，由于莫斯科正在改进其打击战术，关键基础设施，特别是那些在俄罗斯冬季空袭行动中遭到严重破坏并使国家濒临灾难的能源设施，仍然非常脆弱……他说，俄罗斯正在乌克兰东南部准备新一轮地面进攻，动用其战略预备队向该国境内的部队增派了2万名新兵。他援引一份与《金融时报》分享的GUR评估报告称，目前地面上有约68万名士兵，俄罗斯的目标是在9月前占领整个顿巴斯地区。” @ChristopherJM https://www.ft.com/content/d47abaa2-8cfc-48eb-a996-909580b8c816 推文

text: Open Source Intel Q: There's reporting that China is preparing weapons shipments to Iran. What's your reaction? HEGSETH: President Trump has a very strong and direct relationship with President Xi. They communicated and China assured us that that is not going to happen https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044764083057041414/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 问：有报道称中国正在准备向伊朗运送武器。你的反应是什么？赫格塞斯：特朗普总统与习近平主席有着非常牢固和直接的关系。他们进行了沟通，中国向我们保证这种情况不会发生 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044764083057041414/video/1 推文

text: 🇷🇺 🇪🇸 Russia delivered a record volume of gas to Spain in the first month of the Middle East conflict, according to El País . Imports doubled compared to February, reaching an all-time high of nearly 10,000 GWh of Russian gas in a single month. Despite sanctions, the EU continues to allow Russian gas imports through at least 2027. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇪🇸 据《国家报》报道，在中东冲突的第一个月，俄罗斯向西班牙输送了创纪录的天然气量。进口量比2月份翻了一番，单月达到近100亿千瓦时的俄罗斯天然气，创下历史新高。尽管受到制裁，欧盟仍继续允许俄罗斯天然气进口，至少持续到2027年。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 🛸 💥 🇮🇱 Hezbollah: Scenes from an operation in which the Islamic Resistance targeted an Israeli army Merkava tank in the town of Deir Seryan in southern Lebanon using an FPV drone. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🔄 Forwarded from China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong: *Join Danny Haiphong LIVE today April 16th 12noon eastern 7pm CET w/ Larry Johnson!* Danny Haiphong and Larry Johnson discuss the latest developments in the Iran war, and how Iran and China have hit back against Trump’s Naval blockade. We review Larry’s recent report on the US imminently beginning strikes on Iran soon as Trump panics over dwindling options amid the ceasefire. All this plus much more! Watch here: https://www.youtube.com/live/50jhZ7JH6yU?si=VTr13NQAViIDrfEQ

text: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 L’Orient Today: The Israeli army withdrew from Deir Siryan and Qantara after extensive destruction as part of as an effort to consolidate the boundaries of a “buffer zone,” rather than keep troops deployed in positions considered too exposed to Hezbollah attacks. The two villages were heavily razed during the offensive, with Deir Siryan’s mokhtar reporting fresh explosions in the village as recently as Sunday and Monday, indicating Israeli forces had remained there until shortly before the pullback. According to the report, the withdrawal appears tied less to a full retreat and more to a tactical repositioning after demolishing infrastructure in areas the Israeli army did not intend to hold permanently. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 《今日东方报》：以色列军队在对代尔西里扬（Deir Siryan）和坎塔拉（Qantara）进行大规模破坏后撤出，这是为了巩固“缓冲区”边界，而不是将部队部署在被认为极易受到真主党袭击的阵地。这两个村庄在进攻期间被夷为平地，代尔西里扬的村长报告称，直到周日和周一村内仍有新的爆炸声，表明以色列军队在撤离前不久仍驻扎在那里。据报道，此次撤离似乎与其说是全面撤退，不如说是以色列军队在拆除其不打算永久占领地区的设施后的战术重新部署。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "BREAKING: The U.S. appears to have ended its military presence in Syria with the last convoy leaving the Qasrak base in the northeast. Control of the area is now shifting to Syrian forces. This effectively ends the U.S. ground presence that began in 2014." Syria says it has taken control of all former U.S. military bases on its territory.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Clash Report：“突发：美国似乎已结束在叙利亚的军事存在，最后一支车队已离开东北部的卡斯拉克（Qasrak）基地。该地区的控制权现已移交给叙利亚军队。这实际上结束了自2014年开始的美国地面存在。” 叙利亚称已接管其领土上所有前美军基地。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇺🇸🇮🇱🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of Defence Pete Hegseth pushed back against claims that the Trump administration's zero-enrichment policy toward Iran was driven by Israeli pressure, saying "not a single thing has been foisted upon the President of the United States."…" ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of Defence Pete Hegseth said China has assured the United States that it will not ship weapons to Iran, citing direct communication between President Trump and President Xi ahead of their planned meeting next month. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇺🇸🇮🇱🇮🇷 美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）反驳了有关特朗普政府对伊朗的零浓缩政策是受以色列压力驱动的说法，称‘没有一件事是强加给美国总统的’……” ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯表示，中国已向美国保证不会向伊朗运送武器，并援引了特朗普总统与习近平主席在下个月计划会晤前进行的直接沟通。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. Joint Chiefs of Staff Chairman Dan Cain provided a detailed briefing on the naval blockade of Iran, stating that 13 ships have turned back since operations began, with no boardings required as of Tuesday morning. Cain said the blockade procedure…" ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of Defence Pete Hegseth pushed back against claims that the Trump administration's zero-enrichment policy toward Iran was driven by Israeli pressure, saying "not a single thing has been foisted upon the President of the United States." "President Trump makes his own decisions about the interests of this country," Hegseth said, adding that those making such claims "are not in those meetings" and are "just flat wrong." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国参谋长联席会议主席丹·凯恩（Dan Cain）就对伊朗的海上封锁提供了详细简报，称自行动开始以来已有13艘船只折返，截至周二上午无需登船检查。凯恩表示，封锁程序……” ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯反驳了有关特朗普政府对伊朗的零浓缩政策是受以色列压力驱动的说法，称“没有一件事是强加给美国总统的”。赫格塞斯说：“特朗普总统就这个国家的利益做出了自己的决定。”他补充说，那些提出这种说法的人“并没有参加那些会议”，而且“完全错了”。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 "We embedded specially trained air defenders alongside our partner nation soldiers. To give you a sense of their contribution and impact, the king and crown prince of Bahrain both personally knew our soldiers by name ... and there's no better teammate than Israel." - Brad Cooper 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 “我们将训练有素的防空人员嵌入到我们的伙伴国家士兵中。为了让你了解他们的贡献和影响，巴林国王和王储都亲自叫得出我们士兵的名字……没有比以色列更好的队友了。” - 布拉德·库珀（Brad Cooper）🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of War Pete Hegseth issued a direct warning to Iran's leadership, saying American forces are "locked and loaded" on Iran's remaining power generation, critical infrastructure and energy industry, and that a naval blockade of Iranian energy…" ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Joint Chiefs of Staff Chairman Dan Cain provided a detailed briefing on the naval blockade of Iran, stating that 13 ships have turned back since operations began, with no boardings required as of Tuesday morning. Cain said the blockade procedure involves a junior officer transmitting a warning to approaching vessels: "Do not attempt to breach the blockade. Vessels will be boarded for interdiction and seizure transiting to or from Iranian ports. Turn around or prepare to be boarded. If you do not comply with this blockade, we will use force." He added that similar maritime interdiction operations are being conducted in the Pacific against vessels that departed before the blockade began, and that any ship failing to comply "will be dealt with accordingly." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国战争部长皮特·赫格塞斯向伊朗领导层发出直接警告，称美军已‘锁定并装弹’，目标是伊朗剩余的发电、关键基础设施和能源工业，并且对伊朗能源的海上封锁……” ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国参谋长联席会议主席丹·凯恩就对伊朗的海上封锁提供了详细简报，称自行动开始以来已有13艘船只折返，截至周二上午无需登船检查。凯恩表示，封锁程序包括一名初级军官向靠近的船只发出警告：“不要试图突破封锁。往返伊朗港口的船只将被登船拦截和扣押。掉头或准备接受登船检查。如果你不遵守此封锁，我们将使用武力。”他补充说，类似的拦截行动正在太平洋地区针对封锁开始前出发的船只进行，任何不遵守的船只“都将得到相应处理”。@wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of War Pete Hegseth issued a direct warning to Iran's leadership, saying American forces are "locked and loaded" on Iran's remaining power generation, critical infrastructure and energy industry, and that a naval blockade of Iranian energy exports is already underway — conducted, he said, with less than ten percent of U.S. naval power. Hegseth told Iran's IRGC and armed forces leadership that they have "no defence industry, no ability to replenish offensive or defensive capabilities," adding that Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent is simultaneously launching what he called "Operation Economic Fury" to maximise financial pressure. "You can dig out for now, but you can't reconstitute. But we can," Hegseth said. "If Iran chooses poorly, then they will have a blockade and bombs dropping on infrastructure, power and energy. To Iran — choose wisely." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国战争部长皮特·赫格塞斯向伊朗领导层发出直接警告，称美军已“锁定并装弹”，目标是伊朗剩余的发电、关键基础设施和能源工业，并且对伊朗能源出口的海上封锁已经在进行中——他说，这仅动用了不到百分之十的美国海军力量。赫格塞斯告诉伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队和武装部队领导层，他们“没有国防工业，没有补充进攻或防御能力的能力”，并补充说财政部长斯科特·贝森特（Scott Bessent）正在同时发起他所谓的“经济愤怒行动”（Operation Economic Fury），以最大限度地施加经济压力。赫格塞斯说：“你们现在可以挖地洞躲藏，但你们无法重建。而我们可以。如果伊朗做出错误选择，那么他们将面临封锁和投向基础设施、电力和能源的炸弹。致伊朗——明智地选择。”@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Treasury is launching Operation Economic Fury to maximize pressure on Iran — Hegseth. Operation Economic Epstein Fury!
